title: MCDonalds Fries 3D
description: Replaces baked potatoes with 3D MCDonalds french fries.
body:
### Works in Vanilla 1.13-1.21.5 Replaces baked potatoes with 3D MCDonalds french fries. I was inspired by other packs that do the same with 2d textures but thought why not have a 3d pack of fries instead! ### Supports Hold My Items (HMI) -> See Versions This version simply features adjusted rotations to make the 3d model be oriented correctly when using HMI.

![Fries in 3rd person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zg5vKj3y/images/cdf0c2db829ac73a2447c4c7261dc8649f8c708e.png) ![Fries in my hand (using the "Hold My Items" mod)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zg5vKj3y/images/35924f76097e81211604f9e666e354326e955a03.png) ![Fries on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zg5vKj3y/images/b51ba7ddd99201c1b65da9f8d6cac05e16e09df8.png)
